N2003 Medicationn Follow Up Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates the facility contacted a physician (or physician-designee) by midnight of the next calendar day and completed prescribed/ recommended actions in response to the identified potential clinically significant medication issues. effective 10/01/2018
752 N2005_MDCTN_INTRVTN_IND N2005_MDCTN_INTRVTN_IND N2005 Medication Intervention Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates the facility contacted and completed physician (or physician-designee)
